mapper.sql: id, member_id, member_nickname, member_icon, product_id, product_name, product_pic, product_price, product_sub_title, create_time
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ums_member_product_collection (member_id, member_nickname, member_icon, product_id, product_name, product_pic, product_price, product_sub_title, create_time) values (#{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberIcon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productPic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{productSubTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ums_member_product_collection
member_id, member_nickname, member_icon, product_id, product_name, product_pic, product_price, product_sub_title, create_time,
#{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberIcon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productPic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{productSubTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update ums_member_product_collection set member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, member_nickname = #{memberNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, member_icon = #{memberIcon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_pic = #{productPic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_price = #{productPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, product_sub_title = #{productSubTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: delete from ums_member_product_collection where member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
from ums_member_product_collection where member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by create_time desc
